description: Creates a line segment in 3D space between two endpoints. For equation-based line forms, use parametricline3d, symmetricline3d, cartesianline3d, pointvectorline3d, or directionline3d.
utility: Create a line segment between two 3D points

arguments.name: point1
arguments.description: Start point of the line segment

arguments.name: point2
arguments.description: End point of the line segment

alternates.description: Line segment from point P1 to point P2
Line segment using six inline coordinates (x1,y1,z1, x2,y2,z2)
Shift line along its direction by distance
Shift line opposite to its direction by distance
Shift line sideways perpendicular to its direction and an axis vector (ax, ay, az)
Flip the direction of the line (swap start and end)
Copy line to a new starting location
Create a parallel line passing through a point

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
P1 = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
P2 = point3d(G, 3, 4, 5)
L = line3d(G, P1, P2)

examples.scenario: Line from inline coordinates with color

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
L = line3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 1, 0, 0))
fwd = forward3d(L, 2)

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
L = line3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 3, 0, 0))
P = point3d(G, 0, 2, 0)
L2 = pll3d(L, P)

examples.scenario: Point on a line at the midpoint
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
L = line3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 4, 4, 4))
mid = point3d(G, L, 0.5)
